command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '课程'
ws['B1'] = '参与人数'
ws['C1'] = '平均分'
ws['D1'] = '通过率(%)'
ws['A2'] = '安全规范'
ws['B2'] = 45
ws['C2'] = 88.5
ws['D2'] = 93
ws['A3'] = '产品知识'
ws['B3'] = 45
ws['C3'] = 79.2
ws['D3'] = 84
ws['A4'] = '销售技巧'
ws['B4'] = 38
ws['C4'] = 92.1
ws['D4'] = 97
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/training_scores.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 从/home/user/Desktop/training_scores.xlsx中找到通过率最高的课程，在/home/user/Desktop/training_summary.txt末尾追加：'通过率最高课程：销售技巧（97%）'，保存
